name: rockstarr-infra
description: Rockstarr AI infrastructure plugin. Scaffolds the per-client folder, ingests the workbook, generates the style guide, runs the knowledge base, captures the tool stack, and exposes shared utilities every Rockstarr bot depends on. Ships the cross-bot approvals + urgent-reply layer (approvals-digest daily client-bound email, approvals-backlog-alert weekly strategist-bound email when the queue exceeds a configurable threshold, notify-reply-ready urgent client-bound email when an outreach reply lands) with scheduled tasks wired at scaffold time. v0.8.1 added the canonical thought-leadership rubric at skills/_shared/references/tl-rubric.md (consumed by rockstarr-content v0.3+); v0.8.2 added the canonical blog SEO + GEO reference at skills/_shared/references/blog-seo-geo.md (consumed by rockstarr-content v0.4+) covering FAQ structure, keyword placement and density, internal linking rules, inline source URL convention, meta title and description specs, and the 13-item quality checklist that rockstarr-content's draft-blog runs as Pass 1 before stop-slop; v0.8.3 extends capture-stack to capture every stack attribute rockstarr-social v0.1 reads — drafting cadence and weekly mix, channels, Publer account labels, polls cadence, page-follower-invite configuration, and the daily LinkedIn comment-check managed-account list with optional ClickUp closure. v0.8.4 adds a Task system category (ClickUp default; Asana, Linear, Notion, none accepted) and gates every ClickUp-touching capture (li_comment_clickup_enabled and per-account clickup_task_id) on task_system being ClickUp — clients on other task systems never get asked.
